ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show the instructions on how to use the plugin when using it
ast.target: 是否在使用插件时显示使用说明

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, the plugin won't allow you to title notes with Window's illegal characters even if you are not on Windows. If running on windows this setting has no effect.
ast.target: 开启后，即使您不在 Windows 系统上，插件也不允许您使用 Windows 的非法字符来命名笔记。如果在 Windows 上运行，此设置无效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default file extension of the notes
ast.target: 笔记的默认文件扩展名

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When creating a new note, and you have not written anything into the text box, the first folder recommendation will be your current folder.
ast.target: 创建新笔记时，如果您未在文本框中输入任何内容，第一个文件夹建议将是您当前所在的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, a Recommendation named "Current Folder" will be available on the folder selection, you can change the name of the recommendation on the next setting.
ast.target: 开启后，文件夹选择中将提供一个名为“当前文件夹”的建议，您可以在下一个设置中更改该建议的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the "Current Folder" recomendation on the folder selection.
ast.target: 文件夹选择中“当前文件夹”建议的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you create a note without giving it a title, the program will use the default title specified in the 'Name for untitled notes' setting. However, if this setting is turned off, the program will ask you to enter a title for the note.
ast.target: 当您创建笔记而未给它命名时，程序将使用“未命名笔记的默认名称”设置中指定的默认名称。但是，如果此设置关闭，程序将要求您输入笔记的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 未命名笔记的默认名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to use templates that define the contents of the new note.
ast.target: 是否使用定义新笔记内容的模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files in this folder will be available as templates.
ast.target: 此文件夹中的文件将可用作模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to use templates that replace dates and are displayed to you when giving your note a title.
ast.target: 是否使用替换日期的模板，并在您为笔记命名时显示给您。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When this option is turned on, the 'New Note' button located on top of the file explorer will function as a shortcut to the command that is defined on the 'Override command'.
ast.target: 开启此选项后，位于文件资源管理器顶部的“新建笔记”按钮将作为“覆盖命令”中定义的命令的快捷方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The command that will be called when you click Obsidian's 'New note' button.
ast.target: 当您点击 Obsidian 的“新建笔记”按钮时将调用的命令。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 覆盖 Obsidian 的新建笔记按钮

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Add a title to the note

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The note title must not include any of this characters: < > : " ? | *
ast.target: 笔记标题不得包含以下任何字符：< > : \" ? | *

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The note title must not be only '\\' or '/'
ast.target: 笔记标题不能仅为 '\\\\' 或 '/'

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The note extension must not include any of this characters: < > : "  ? | * /
ast.target: 笔记扩展名不得包含以下任何字符：< > : \"  ? | * /

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The note extension must not include the character: /
ast.target: 笔记扩展名不得包含字符：/

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error opening the file, report issue to GitHub
ast.target: 打开文件时出错，请在 GitHub 上报告问题

ast.name: bulk-current-tab
ast.target: 批量创建笔记：当前标签页

ast.name: bulk-new-tab
ast.target: 批量创建笔记：新标签页

ast.name: bulk-split-horizontal
ast.target: 批量创建笔记：水平拆分

ast.name: bulk-split-vertical
ast.target: 批量创建笔记：垂直拆分

ast.target: 在新标签页中打开笔记

ast.target: 在当前标签页中打开笔记

ast.target: 在当前窗口中水平拆分打开笔记

ast.source: Note in current window spliting vertically
ast.target: 在当前窗口中垂直拆分打开笔记

ast.source: Bulk note creation in new tabs
ast.target: 在新标签页中批量创建笔记

ast.target: 在当前标签页中批量创建笔记

ast.target: 在新窗口中批量创建笔记

ast.target: 在水平拆分中批量创建笔记

ast.target: 在垂直拆分中批量创建笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Inside your template you can put '{{date}}' which when the note is created its gonna be replaced with the value that you define on this setting. With your current settings {{date}} will be replaced with
ast.target: 在您的模板中，您可以放置 '{{date}}'，当笔记创建时，它将被替换为您在此设置中定义的值。根据您当前的设置，{{date}} 将被替换为

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can also use {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}} to override the format.
ast.target: 您也可以使用 {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}} 来覆盖格式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Inside your template you can put '{{time}}' which when the note is created its gonna be replaced with the value that you define on this setting. With your current settings {{time}} will be replaced with
ast.target: 在您的模板中，您可以放置 '{{time}}'，当笔记创建时，它将被替换为您在此设置中定义的值。根据您当前的设置，{{time}} 将被替换为

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can also use {{time:YYYY-MM-DD}} to override the format.
ast.target: 您也可以使用 {{time:YYYY-MM-DD}} 来覆盖格式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you have note title templates turned on, you will see them when you are inputing your note title. For example, when you create a note with the template:
ast.target: 如果您开启了笔记标题模板，当您输入笔记标题时会看到它们。例如，当您使用模板创建笔记时：
